hooks.command: grep -rE '(password|secret|token|api_key)\s*=\s*["\'][^$]' $CLAUDE_FILE_PATH 2>/dev/null && echo 'WARNING: Possible hardcoded secret detected' || true
if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -q '\.proto$'; then cd proto && buf lint 2>&1 | head -5 || true; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -q '\.go$'; then go vet $(dirname $CLAUDE_FILE_PATH)/... 2>&1 | head -10 || true; fi
